title: Battle of Bespin (disambiguation)
content:
The '''Battle of Bespin''' can refer to:

==Canon==
===Galactic Civil War===
*'''[[Duel on Cloud City]]''', the duel between [[Luke Skywalker]] and [[Anakin Skywalker|Darth Vader]].
*'''[[Escape from Cloud City]]'''.
*'''[[Liberation of Cloud City]]''', a battle that took place during the [[Iron Blockade]].

==Legends==
===New Sith Wars===
*[[Battle of Bespin (New Sith Wars)]]

===Clone Wars===
*[[Battle of Bespin (Clone Wars)]]

===[[Imperial Era]]===
*[[Battle of Bespin (Imperial Period)]]

===[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]===
*[[Rescue of Garm Bel Iblis]]
*[[Occupation of Bespin]]
*[[Duel on Cloud City/Legends|Duel on Cloud City]]
*[[Ground Battle on Bespin]]
*[[Ugnaught rebellion]]
*[[Battle of Bespin (Galactic Civil War)]]
*[[Raid on Bespin]]
*[[Liberation of Bespin]]
*[[Skirmish on Bespin]]
*[[Battle of Bespin (Empire Reborn)]]
